description: Metadata-only manifest of the synthetic NovaCorp HR corpus referenced by the benchmark's GT documents. The evaluator's built-in mock retriever does not need actual document contents — it uses doc_id and filename from the ingested queries. Provided so a real retrieval system can be seeded with realistic-looking documents.

documents.description: NovaCorp Employee Handbook 2025 — general employment terms.
Code of Conduct — behavioural expectations, disciplinary process.
US Benefits Guide 2025 — medical, dental, 401(k), FSA/HSA.
EU Benefits Guide 2025 — statutory leave, pensions, healthcare.
India Benefits Guide 2025 — EPF, gratuity, medical, LTA.
Global Paid Time Off policy — vacation, sick, personal days.
Leave Types Matrix — parental, bereavement, jury duty, sabbatical.
Parental Leave Policy — primary/secondary caregiver terms.
Remote Work Policy — eligibility, equipment, stipends.
Hybrid Work Guidelines — office days, meeting norms.
Compensation Philosophy — bands, market data, review cycles.
Annual Bonus Plan — target %, weighting, payout mechanics.
Equity Plan (RSU) — grants, vesting schedule, forfeiture.
Payroll Calendar 2025 — pay periods, cutoff dates by country.
Employee Expense & Reimbursement Policy.
New Hire Onboarding — day 1 checklist, 30/60/90 milestones.
Offboarding Checklist — exit interview, asset return, access.
Performance Management — cycles, ratings, calibration.
Performance Improvement Plan — process, duration, outcomes.
Learning & Development — budget, catalog, tuition reimbursement.
Employee Referral Program — bonus tiers, eligibility.
DEI Policy — commitments, ERGs, reporting.
Anti-Harassment & Anti-Discrimination Policy.
Grievance / Complaints Procedure.
IT Acceptable Use Policy — devices, accounts, monitoring.
Bring-Your-Own-Device Policy — mobile, MDM, stipend.
Information Security Policy — passwords, MFA, incident reporting.
Employee Data Privacy Notice — GDPR/CCPA obligations.
Contractor / Independent-Worker Engagement Policy.
Immigration & Relocation Support — visas, moving support.
Workplace Health & Safety Policy.
Wellness Program & Employee Assistance Program.
